description_long: This is a classic, upright fire hydrant painted in a muted yellow color, featuring a domed top with a central operating nut and a flanged base for secure mounting to the ground. The hydrant has two large side outlets for hose connections, each capped and protruding horizontally, and a smaller front-facing outlet. The body is robust and cylindrical, with visible bolts around the base and at the top flange, indicating a heavy-duty cast metal construction. Subtle surface details include embossed manufacturer markings and model information on the front, as well as some minor surface wear and paint chipping. The overall form is utilitarian, designed for high visibility and easy access in emergency situations.
description: A yellow, cast-metal fire hydrant with a domed top, three hose outlets, and embossed manufacturer markings. It features a sturdy, flanged base and prominent side caps.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central outlet, domed top, and symmetrical side outlets with caps.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting one side outlet and the cylindrical body, with the top nut visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the embossed manufacturer and model markings, both side outlets, and the flanged base.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the opposite side outlet and the hydrant's robust cylindrical form.
